options.sentence: Had she studied medicine, she would now be working at the hospital.
Had she studied medicine, she would have now worked at the hospital.
Had she studied medicine, she will now be working at the hospital.
Had she studied medicine, she would now worked at the hospital.
Had she studied medicine, she would be worked at the hospital now.

explanation.english: Mixed conditionals combine a past unreal condition with a present consequence.
explanation.chinese: 混合虚拟条件句表示过去假设导致现在结果。

options.sentence: Having completed the report, she emailed it to the manager.
Having completed the report, the manager received it.
Having complete the report, she emailed it to the manager.
Completed the report, she emailed it to the manager.
Having been completed the report, she emailed it.

explanation.english: Participial clauses must logically refer to the subject of the main clause.
explanation.chinese: 分词短语的逻辑主语必须与主句主语一致。

options.sentence: John enjoys classical music more than his brother does.
John enjoys classical music more than his brother.
John enjoys classical music more than does his brother enjoys.
John enjoys classical music more than his brother do.
John enjoys classical music more than his brother is.

explanation.english: Ellipsis often omits repeated verbs, but auxiliary agreement must remain correct.
explanation.chinese: 省略结构中可省略重复成分，但助动词形式必须正确。

options.sentence: There appears to have been a misunderstanding.
There appears having been a misunderstanding.
There appear to has been a misunderstanding.
There appears that have been a misunderstanding.
There appearing to have been a misunderstanding.

explanation.english: Existential 'there' may be followed by perfect infinitives.
explanation.chinese: 存在句 there 后可接完成不定式。

options.sentence: Little information was available regarding the incident.
Few information was available regarding the incident.
Little informations were available regarding the incident.
Few information were available regarding the incident.
Little information were available regarding the incident.

explanation.english: 'Information' is uncountable and takes 'little' and a singular verb.
explanation.chinese: 'Information' 是不可数名词，用 little 并接单数动词。

options.sentence: The more carefully you read, the more easily you understand the argument.
The more carefully you read, more easily you understand the argument.
The carefully you read, the more easily you understand the argument.
The more carefully you read, the easier you understand the argument.
More carefully you read, the more easily you understand the argument.

explanation.chinese: 比较关联结构必须使用 'the...the...'。

options.sentence: She seems to have forgotten about the appointment.
She seems having forgotten about the appointment.
She seems to forgot about the appointment.
She seems have forgotten about the appointment.
She seems forgetting about the appointment.

explanation.english: Perfect infinitives indicate an action occurring before the main verb.
explanation.chinese: 完成不定式表示动作发生在主要动词之前。

options.sentence: Students enrolled in the course must submit their assignments online.
Students enrolling in the course was submit their assignments online.
Students enrolled the course must submit their assignments online.
Students which enrolled in the course must submit their assignments online.
Students enrolled in the course submits their assignments online.

explanation.english: Past participles may reduce passive relative clauses.
explanation.chinese: 过去分词可简化被动定语从句。

options.sentence: He behaved as if nothing had happened.
He behaved as if nothing has happened.
He behaved as if nothing happens.
He behaved as if nothing would happen.
He behaved as if nothing happened has.

explanation.english: 'As if' often takes the past perfect when referring to unreal past events.
explanation.chinese: 表示与过去事实相反时，as if 后常用过去完成时。

options.sentence: You should have informed us about the changes earlier.
You should informed us about the changes earlier.
You should have inform us about the changes earlier.
You should had informed us about the changes earlier.
You should to have informed us about the changes earlier.

explanation.english: Modal perfect constructions use 'modal + have + past participle.'
explanation.chinese: 情态动词完成式结构为 '情态动词 + have + 过去分词'。

options.sentence: A colleague of my father's recommended the book.
A colleague of my father recommended the book.
A colleague from my father's recommended the book.
A colleague of my father's's recommended the book.
A colleague my father's recommended the book.

explanation.english: Double genitives combine 'of' with a possessive form.
explanation.chinese: 双重所有格结构由 'of + 所有格' 构成。

options.sentence: So difficult was the exam that many students left early.
So difficult the exam was that many students left early.
So was difficult the exam that many students left early.
So difficult was the exam many students left early.
So difficult did the exam was that many students left early.

explanation.english: 'So + adjective' at the beginning may trigger inversion.
explanation.chinese: 句首的 'So + 形容词' 可以引起倒装。

options.sentence: The professor to whom I spoke was very helpful.
The professor whom I spoke to was very helpful.
The professor to who I spoke was very helpful.
The professor which I spoke to was very helpful.
The professor to whom I spoke to was very helpful.

explanation.english: Formal relative clauses may front prepositions before 'whom.'
explanation.chinese: 正式定语从句中，介词可提前放在 whom 前面。

options.sentence: I do appreciate your willingness to help.
I do appreciates your willingness to help.
I does appreciate your willingness to help.
I appreciated do your willingness to help.
I do appreciating your willingness to help.

explanation.english: Emphatic 'do' is used with the base form of the verb.
explanation.chinese: 强调助动词 do 后接动词原形。

options.sentence: The lecture was so informative that everyone stayed until the end.
The lecture was such informative that everyone stayed until the end.
The lecture was so informative everyone stayed until the end.
The lecture was such an informative that everyone stayed until the end.
The lecture was too informative that everyone stayed until the end.

explanation.chinese: 'So + 形容词 + that' 用于表示结果。
